summary: Iteration 12 - Frontend testing for ACEinovations premium website. Dark mode toggle works correctly - adds .dark class to HTML element and persists via localStorage. Dark mode persists across page navigation (Labs, Squads, About). Space Grotesk font configured for headings. /stacks page fails due to PostgreSQL connection error (expected per agent context).

integration_issues.issue: Server-side exception due to PostgreSQL password authentication failure. Error: 'cannot connect to Postgres: password authentication failed for user aceadmin'. This is a database configuration issue, not a code issue.

dark_mode.icon_changes: Moon icon (light mode) -> Sun icon (dark mode)

home_page.hero: AI-AUGMENTED ENGINEERING STUDIO badge, 'Engineering the Next Generation of Digital Platforms.' headline with gradient text

stacks_page.error: Application error: a server-side exception has occurred - PostgreSQL password authentication failed for user 'aceadmin'

features_verified: Dark mode toggle works - clicking moon icon toggles to dark theme, sun icon toggles back to light
Dark mode persists on page navigation (stored in localStorage key 'ace-dark-mode')
Home page (/) - all sections render: Hero, Transition, Philosophy, ACE Engine, ACE Squads, ACE Loop, Insights, CTA, Footer
Labs page (/labs) - hero with badge, title, subtitle, CTA button. Products section with 3 cards. Philosophy section. Footer.
Squads page (/squads) - hero, 3 role cards (Architect, Engineer, Growth Specialist), advantage section, footer
About page (/about) - hero section with CTA, footer
Services dropdown in navbar opens and shows 4 items
Footer has CTA section + 4-column layout (Brand, Services, Products, Company) + copyright + Privacy/Terms/Cookies
ScrollSpiral SVG background animation present on all pages
Space Grotesk font is used for headings (configured via CSS variable and Tailwind config)
action_items: CRITICAL: Fix /stacks page - PostgreSQL database connection failing with password authentication error for user 'aceadmin'. Either restart PostgreSQL service or fix database credentials in DATABASE_URI env var.
Once DB is fixed, verify stacks page shows 6 blog post cards with category labels, read time, title, excerpt, date, and Read arrow link
Once DB is fixed, verify Stacks sidebar shows Recommended Stack tools
critical_code_review_comments: Dark mode implementation is correct - uses document.documentElement.classList and localStorage
Space Grotesk font properly configured in layout.tsx, tailwind.config.ts, and globals.css
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
CSS variables for dark mode properly defined in globals.css with .dark selector

success_rate.frontend: 80% - 4/5 pages working (stacks fails due to DB connection)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark mode toggle is fully functional - adds .dark class to HTML and persists via localStorage 'ace-dark-mode'. Space Grotesk font working for headings. Home, Labs, Squads, About pages all working correctly in both light and dark modes. /stacks page requires PostgreSQL database to be running with correct credentials. Previous logs showed stacks were being created (POST /api/stacks 201) so the data might exist if DB connection is fixed.
